mapper.select: select count(*) from users where status in ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE')
select count(*) from users where hire_date >= trunc(sysdate, 'MM') and hire_date < ADD_MONTHS(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), 1)
select count(*) from users where resign_date >= trunc(sysdate, 'MM') and resign_date < ADD_MONTHS(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), 1)
select count(*) from ai_unanswered_questions where status = 'PENDING'
select count(*) from supply_request where status = 'PENDING'
select d.dept_name as deptName, count(u.id) as employeeCount from departments d left join users u on d.dept_seq = u.dept_seq group by d.dept_name order by d.dept_name
